vulnerability.reference: Label flipping unlearning can distort decision boundaries, degrading model accuracy and fairness.
vulnerability.generated: Approximate unlearning leaves residual knowledge exploitable by adversarial prompts, making model predictions unreliable for dependent users.

impact.reference: Degraded model predictions lead to incorrect decisions in high-stakes applications like lending or healthcare.
impact.generated: Erroneous predictions and recovered sensitive data degrade user decisions and erode trust in model outputs.

dose_response.generated: Adversarial prompts recovering residual knowledge post-approximate-unlearning, through users exposed to degraded model predictions, trigger exploitable residual knowledge that makes predictions unreliable, leading to erroneous predictions and recovered sensitive data degrading decisions and eroding trust.
